title: Loom planning-pack manifest (frontmatter)
description: Machine-checkable shape of plans/MANIFEST.md frontmatter. Body sections per templates/pack/MANIFEST.md.

tier.description: S packs normally don't exist (single WO instead); if one does, it must say why.

status.description: Pack-level status. 'stale' = a pack-wide staleness trigger fired (loom/execution/staleness.md); individual artifacts carry their own status per loom/planning/plan-authoring.md.

loom_version.description: Loom version that produced the pack (CHANGELOG.md) — makes stale guidance traceable.

plan_contract_version.description: Present on orchestrated packs whose sealed plan contract and obligation assignments lint must enforce.

execution_mode.description: planned is eligible for causal plan credit; historical and build-first are explicitly not.

domain_id.description: Primary domain selected by loom_domain; also scopes owner memory.

domain_ids.description: Ordered matched domains for composite planning/memory selection; domain_id is the primary and must be included.

domain_coverage.description: adapter = shipped checklist selected; unknown blocks G1; verified requires a completed domain-discovery artifact.

repo_head.description: Commit hash at last survey; staleness rechecks diff against it. Absent only when no repo exists yet.

repo_state_hash.description: Content-sensitive workspace snapshot excluding the private pack.
